codeSystems.name: HighRiskRule
codeSystems.title: High-Risk Routing Rule
codeSystems.description: Deterministic high-risk rules that force escalation regardless of model confidence (Section 9.1).

codeSystems.name: OversightDisposition
codeSystems.title: Oversight Disposition
codeSystems.description: The clinician's disposition of an agentic AI recommendation.

codeSystems.name: OversightEventType
codeSystems.title: Oversight Event Type
codeSystems.description: Distinguishes a human oversight decision from a system escalation.

codeSystems.name: OversightReason
codeSystems.title: Oversight Override Reason
codeSystems.description: Structured reasons a clinician gives when overriding (editing or rejecting) an agentic AI recommendation.
